description_long: This is a round, golden-brown bread with a prominent central hole, resembling a classic bagel. The surface is generously sprinkled with white sesame seeds, giving it a textured and appetizing appearance. The crust is slightly glossy and well-baked, with a gradient from deep brown on top to a lighter, almost white color near the bottom edge. The bread appears dense and chewy, typical of bagels, with a smooth, unbroken exterior and no visible cuts or slices. The bottom shows a slightly rougher, flour-dusted texture, while the top is more uniform and covered in seeds. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A round, golden-brown bagel with a central hole and a sesame seed-covered crust. The surface is glossy and textured, with a dense, chewy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bagel's round shape, central hole, and dense coverage of sesame seeds on the golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the bagel's slightly flattened profile and the gradient from dark brown on top to lighter edges, with visible sesame seeds.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the even distribution of seeds and the smooth, unbroken surface of the bagel, with a clear view of the central hole.
description_view_3: This side shows the rougher, flour-dusted bottom edge and the transition from the glossy, seeded top to the lighter underside.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is evenly covered with white sesame seeds, giving it a speckled, textured appearance. The surface is smooth and glossy on top, with a subtle gradient from dark golden brown to lighter tones near the bottom.
